/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/app/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/core/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/core/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/physics/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/physics/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/physics/solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/renderer/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/src/ui/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hooke.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o hooke  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so
